# Profit Pathfinder

> Free professional trading and personal-finance platform: portfolio tracking, options analysis, dividend income, retirement (FIRE) planning, real estate and auto-loan calculators, and AI-powered market research.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of all Profit Pathfinder tools.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Personal trading dashboard with watchlists and market overview.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Track stock holdings, positions, and gains/losses in real time.
- [Performance](/performance): Investment returns, benchmarking, and unrealized P&L breakdown.
- [Analysis](/analysis): AI-powered stock analysis with technicals, fundamentals, catalysts, and analyst ratings.
- [Trading Toolkit](/trading-toolkit): Position sizing, risk calculators, journals, and trade utilities.
- [Options Toolkit](/options-portfolio): Covered calls, the Wheel, PMCC, iron condors, and Greeks.
- [0DTE Scanner](/zero-dte): Same-day options chains for SPY, QQQ, and major indices.
- [Market Scanner](/market-scanner): LEAPS and covered-call screeners with advanced filters.
- [Options Guide](/options-guide): Educational guide to options strategies, basic to advanced.
- [Credit Options Guide](/credit-options-guide): Credit spreads, cash-secured puts, and risk-defined income trades.
- [Fundamental Analysis Guide](/fundamental-analysis-guide): CAN SLIM methodology and ratio appropriateness matrix.
- [Dividend Tracker](/dividend-tracker): Yield-on-cost, CAGR, and dividend income projections.
- [Risk Metrics](/risk-metrics): Portfolio VaR, Sharpe, beta, and Monte Carlo simulations.
- [Portfolio Rebalancing](/portfolio-rebalancing): Calculate trades to hit target allocations.
- [Retirement Planning](/retirement-planning): FIRE, Roth conversion, Social Security, and withdrawal strategies.
- [Real Estate Calculator](/real-estate): Rental income, ROI, and mortgage analysis.
- [Car Finance Calculator](/car-finance): Auto loans, depreciation, and total cost of ownership.
- [SmartTrade AI](/smarttrade-ai): Gemini-powered trade planner and strategy simulator.
- [QuantGemini](/quantgemini): Institutional-grade investor scorecards via Gemini AI.
- [IgniteFIRE Suite](/ignite-fire): Advanced retirement and lifestyle planning hub.

## Optional

- [Install](/install): Install Profit Pathfinder as a mobile/desktop app.
